acceptanceCriteria.name: Long provider window controls retry
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: core_test.exs verifies Retry-After 60000 exceeds the 10000 ms exponential delay.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Short provider window preserves backoff
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: core_test.exs verifies the existing 10000 ms delay remains the lower bound.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Stale window is cleared
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: core_test.exs verifies a non-rate failure removes provider_retry_after_ms.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Complete validation suite
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: make -C elixir all: 342 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped, 100% coverage; format, Credo, specs and Dialyzer pass.

summary: The exact candidate commit passes local and remote validation, specialist reviews, and every acceptance criterion. Installation parity will be verified after merge.
